summary: Frontend-only testing of DocScan Pro Expo app. All 14 test scenarios passed successfully. Dashboard and History screens load correctly with all required UI elements.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-breaking but should be addressed.

action_items: Optional: Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow to fix deprecation warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Dashboard shows header (greeting, DocScan Pro, date), stats row (24, 48.3 MB, 2h ago), scan CTA button (blue), 4 quick actions, recent scans horizontal scroll. History shows search (filters correctly, empty state works), filter chips (All/PDF/JPG/PNG/DOCX/XLSX), sort modal with 5 options, list/grid toggle (both layouts render properly). Tab navigation Dashboard↔History works.
